revision.comment: flag ISO alias = Flag of Italy.svg
test for proposal at [[Wikipedia talk:WikiProject Flag Template]]
restore content removed from this template - fixing many broken pages
Added Italian Social Republic flag template
"ROY" unused, "CRO" is awkward label, replaced by "1861-state" as per similar style in other country data templates
transittion complete - sport parameter no longer used using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
"link alias-RSI" has no effect. You have to create [[Template:Country data Italian Social Republic]] if you want that
